title: MBBS Jobs 2026 – Part-Time Medical Officer (PTMO)
shortInfo: NITTTR Kolkata Part-Time Medical Officer (PTMO) Recruitment 2026 announced for 1 contract post. MBBS candidates with valid Medical Council registration and 5 years of hospital experience can attend the walk-in interview on 29 May 2026. Check eligibility, salary, selection process, and interview details at nitttrkol.ac.in.

basic_details.job_title: NITTTR Kolkata Part-Time Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technical Teachers Training and Research Kolkata
basic_details.short_information: NITTTR Kolkata Part-Time Medical Officer (PTMO) Recruitment 2026 announced for 1 contract post. MBBS candidates with valid Medical Council registration and 5 years of hospital experience can attend the walk-in interview on 29 May 2026. Check eligibility, salary, selection process, and interview details at nitttrkol.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with completion of one year of rotating internship, Valid registration certificate from Medical Council of India / State Medical Council, At least 5 years of working experience in a recognised hospital, Desirable: Postgraduate medical qualification (MD/MS/DNB) in relevant specialties
qualification.details: MBBS with completion of one year of rotating internship. Possession of a valid registration certificate from the Medical Council of India / State Medical Council. At least 5 years of working experience in a recognized hospital. Desirable: Postgraduate medical qualification (MD/MS/DNB) in relevant specialties.

faq.question: What is the post name for NITTTR Kolkata Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for the NITTTR Kolkata Recruitment 2026 is Part-Time Medical Officer (PTMO).

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the PTMO post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Part-Time Medical Officer (PTMO) post.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted on 29 May 2026.

faq.question: What are the essential qualifications for the PTMO post?
faq.answer: Essential qualifications include MBBS with one year internship, valid medical registration, and at least 5 years of experience in a recognized hospital.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the PTMO position?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 35,000 to Rs. 55,000 per month.

faq.question: Where is the NITTTR Kolkata located?
faq.answer: NITTTR Kolkata is located in Kolkata, West Bengal, with the pincode 700106.

faq.question: What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates.

faq.question: Is there any age limit mentioned for this post?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limits and relaxation details for this post.
